meta.title: A 2nd Monitoring Network at Level 0/1
meta.description:
ICS security legend Joe Weiss sets foot on the S4 stage for the first time. Joe and Amir Samoiloff make the case that monitoring network traffic to detect ICS cyber incidents is insufficient. They contend that data directly from the sensors, before it has been processed by the PLC / Level 1 device or converted from serial to Ethernet, will miss important information.

They close the presentation with some case studies that support their case.
